Medical Booster

Excellence in Motion

Who We Are

With a prestigious 15-year history rooted in the medical heart of South Korea, Medical Booster has evolved from a local distributor into a global powerhouse of aesthetic excellence.

Our journey is built on unwavering trust and deep-seated relationships with nearly all major Korean manufacturers, giving us unparalleled access to the newest breakthroughs before they reach the general market.

Uniquely, we operate our own state-of-the-art production laboratory. This allows us to not only distribute but also rigorously test and refine the solutions we provide, ensuring every product meets the highest clinical benchmarks.

15+ Years History
Direct Manufacturer Links
In-House Research Lab
rocket_launch

Our Mission

To democratize access to high-end medical aesthetics by streamlining the global supply chain, ensuring that every clinic can offer safe, effective, and innovative treatments directly from the source of K-Beauty innovation.

Global Impact
visibility

Our Vision

To become the world's most trusted digital marketplace for medical professionals, where transparency, authenticity, and clinical excellence converge to elevate the standards of aesthetic medicine globally.

Future Ready

Why Global Clinics Choose Us

verified

Authentic Products

100% genuine medical supplies with verifiable traceability for patient safety.

public

Global Supply Chain

Logistical excellence reaching over 50 countries with temperature-controlled shipping.

Direct from Source

Partnerships with leading Korean manufacturers to provide competitive wholesale pricing.

support_agent

Expert Support

Dedicated account managers providing regulatory documentation and medical insights.

10+
Years of Excellence

From the Heart of Seoul to the World's Best Clinics

Established in the bustling medical district of Gangnam, Seoul, Medical Booster began with a simple observation: the world's most innovative aesthetic technologies were often the hardest to source reliably.

We set out to bridge this gap by building a robust platform that combines the agility of a digital marketplace with the rigorous quality standards of a traditional medical distributor.

Today, we serve a global network of dermatologists and medical spas, helping them stay at the forefront of their field through timely access to the latest Korean advancements in fillers, toxins, and medical devices.

Trusted by 5,000+ Specialists

Elevate Your Practice Today

Join our exclusive B2B network and gain access to premium medical aesthetic products, wholesale pricing, and expert logistics.

Cookie & KVKK Consent

We use cookies to ensure optimal B2B functionality, remember preferences, and analyze site traffic in compliance with KVKK regulations. You can accept all cookies, reject optional cookies, or manage your preferences.
